mapper.sql: a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_url, a.category_id, c.name as category_name, a.is_top, a.is_recommend, a.view_count, a.comment_count, a.like_count, a.published_at
a.is_top desc, a.published_at desc, a.id desc
mapper.select:
select
from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id and c.status = 'visible' where a.status = 'published' and a.is_recommend = true order by limit #{limit}

select
from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id and c.status = 'visible' where a.status = 'published' order by limit #{limit}
select , a.content from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id and c.status = 'visible' where a.id = #{id} and a.status = 'published'
mapper.update: update article set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'published'
mapper.select: select t.id, t.name from tag t inner join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id inner join article a on a.id = at.article_id and a.status = 'published' where at.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.id asc

select c.id, c.name, count(a.id) as article_count from category c left join article a on a.category_id = c.id and a.status = 'published' where c.status = 'visible' group by c.id, c.name, c.sort_order order by c.sort_order asc, c.id desc

select t.id, t.name, count(distinct a.id) as article_count from tag t inner join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id inner join article a on a.id = at.article_id and a.status = 'published' group by t.id, t.name order by t.id desc

select cast(extract(year from a.published_at) as integer) as year, cast(extract(month from a.published_at) as integer) as month, count(a.id) as article_count from article a where a.status = 'published' and a.published_at is not null group by extract(year from a.published_at), extract(month from a.published_at) order by year desc, month desc
mapper.insert: insert into article_like (article_id, visitor_key_hash, ip_hash, created_at) values (#{articleId}, #{visitorKeyHash}, #{ipHash}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: update article set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'published'
mapper.select: select like_count from article where id = #{id} and status = 'published'
